Name: 1. Fill in one row per driver. Required fields: Name, Fs, Qts, Qes, Qms, Vas_l, Re, Sd_cm2, Xmax_mm, Pe
2. Optional fields: Le_mH, Bl, Mms_kg, Sensitivity, Notes (enter 0 if unknown)
3. Save this file, then run:  nordbass driver import NordBass_Driver_Library.xlsx
4. Or export as CSV: File → Save a Copy → CSV, then run:  nordbass driver import yourfile.csv
